properties.text:
Connect any model type (MODEL, CLIP, VAE…). After execution the node displays architecture details on the canvas.

Outputs: class_name (e.g. WAN21, Flux), hidden dimension, and the title of the upstream node that produced the model. Useful for debugging pipelines or routing based on model type.

widgets_values:
